ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Employee's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Employee's last name */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Employee's date of birth */,
  "ssn" TEXT /* Employee's social security number */,
  "state" TEXT /* Employee's state of residence */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "visa_status" TEXT /* Visa status of the employee */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "employee_type" TEXT /* Type of employee (full-time, part-time, contractor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_details" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Employee's address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Employee's phone number */,
  "email" TEXT /* Employee's email address */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship between the employee and emergency contact */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment history record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position title held by the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the employee worked */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the position */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the position */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the position (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the job */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the employee in that position */,
  "reason_for_leaving" TEXT /* Reason for the employee leaving the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_department FOREIGN KEY ("department") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager overseeing the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_title" TEXT /* Title of the position */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the position belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position's responsibilities */,
  "required_skills" TEXT /* List of skills required for the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_positions_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payroll" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Employee's annual salary */,
  "bonus" TEXT /* Any bonuses received by the employee */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Benefits provided to the employee */,
  "pay_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of payroll (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "last_paid_date" TEXT /* Date of the last payroll payment */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status of the employee */,
  "payroll_frequency_type" TEXT /* Type of payroll frequency (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  "gross_income" TEXT /* Gross income of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payroll_benefits FOREIGN KEY ("benefits") REFERENCES benefits ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_tracking" (
  "time_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time tracking record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "date_worked" TEXT /* Date on which the work was performed */,
  "hours_worked" TEXT /* Number of hours worked on that date */,
  "overtime_hours" TEXT /* Number of overtime hours worked on that date */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID associated with the time entry */,
  "task_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the task worked on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_tracking_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_time_tracking_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance review */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score received in the performance review */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided in the performance review */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the training course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the training course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the training course */,
  "completion_status" TEXT /* Status of completion of the training course */,
  "training_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the training */,
  "training_cost" TEXT /* Cost of the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit */,
  "benefit_name" TEXT /* Name of the benefit */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benefit */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., health, dental, vision) */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Name of the benefit provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "labor_laws" TEXT /* Labor laws applicable in the state */,
  "tax_rate" TEXT /* Tax rate applicable in the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
